actions.issue: Outlet demand rising sharply with stable delivery pattern
actions.action: Increase allocation by 10–20% and push premium pack mix
actions.reason: Last 30d revenue up 50% vs prior 30d; CV=0.70 (stable). Segment 'Volatile — Tighter Replenishment' typically has absorption capacity for premium.
